_comment: Copy this file to data.json and edit it to connect your dataset.
title: My Map Title
description: Short description shown in the welcome panel.
_maxDepth_options: region    — click a region polygon to open the detail panel; no drill-in
province  — drill to provinces, then clicking a province opens the detail panel
municity  — full drill-through to individual cities and municipalities (default)
_geoBasePath_note: Path to the philippines-json-maps directory relative to this file. Default: './philippines-json-maps' (the git submodule). Override if your geo data lives elsewhere.
_colorField_note: The field in each data record to use for the choropleth fill color.
_colorDomain_note: Min and max values for the color scale. Values outside this range are clamped.
_colorScheme_note: A D3 sequential interpolator. Options: interpolateBlues, interpolateGreens, interpolateOranges, interpolateReds, interpolatePurples, interpolateYlOrRd, interpolateViridis, interpolatePlasma, interpolateMagma, interpolateInferno, interpolateCool, interpolateWarm.
_detailFields_note: Fields to display in the detail panel when a user clicks an area. 'key' is the field name in your data record; 'label' is the display name shown in the panel.

data._note: Each level is an array of records. Each record MUST have a 'psgc' field matching the PSGC code of the area. All other fields are yours to define — they are looked up by 'colorField' and 'detailFields' above.
